LINGERING CONCUSSION
Shield Slam applies Lingering Concussion to your main target, causing them to deal 3% reduced damage to you for 12 seconds. Lingering Concussion stacks up to 5 times.

TOUGHNESS
Toughness is displayed as a bar to the right of your character. The more Toughness you have, the less damage Helena takes. Your maximum Toughness value (1) is equal to 770% strength. Every 1% of Critical Strike, Haste, Expertise, and Spirit you have further increases the final amount by 2%.
